tableGroups.wordCorrectionHint:
WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT_FALLBACK strategy):
  Uniform drift of -10.73pt across all 1 columns.
  Root cause unclear (cell padding and table indent do not match drift).
  Fix: reduce Table.LeftIndent by -10.73pt (-215 twips).
  This shifts the entire table left as a unit — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Verify: Table.LeftIndent in source .docx = 0pt. New value should be 10.73pt.

WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (COLUMN_WIDTHS strategy):
  Col[0]: drift=+0pt
  Col[1]: drift=-11.04pt
  Apply differential column-width corrections. See columnDrifts[] for per-column values.

negativeCorrection.wordCorrectionHint: [RECLASSIFIED] This phrase group was initially placed in a PDF-heuristic table group (1) but no docxContext confirmed it is inside a Word table. correctionTargets.description: [COLUMN_WIDTH] Reduce col[0] width by -10.73pt to shift col[1] left. Current width must be read from the Word document at runtime.
[COLUMN_WIDTH] Reduce col[0] width by -11.04pt to shift col[1] left. Current width must be read from the Word document at runtime.

negativeCorrection.wordCorrectionHint: Adjust paragraph LeftIndent by +50.58pt (1012 twips); Adjust paragraph SpaceBefore by +0.51pt (10 twips)
